'''tabuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dpty|dpty]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dpty|dpty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tabuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæbiyith|tæbiyith]] || [[word:tæbiyij|tæbiyij]] || [[word:tæbiyish|tæbiyish]] || [[word:tæbiyi|tæbiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tabubuyuth|tabubuyuth]] || [[word:tabubuyuj|tabubuyuj]] || [[word:tabubuyush|tabubuyush]] || [[word:tabubuyu|tabubuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tabuyuth|tabuyuth]] || [[word:tabuyuj|tabuyuj]] || [[word:tabuyush|tabuyush]] || [[word:tabuyu|tabuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tabufyuth|tabufyuth]] || [[word:tabufyuj|tabufyuj]] || [[word:tabufyush|tabufyush]] || [[word:tabufyuf|tabufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tabuyuthu|tabuyuthu]] || [[word:tabuyuju|tabuyuju]] || [[word:tabuyushu|tabuyushu]] || [[word:tabuyuku|tabuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tabuyuth|tabuyuth]] || [[word:tabuyuj|tabuyuj]] || [[word:tabuyush|tabuyush]] || [[word:tabuyu|tabuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tabuyuthul|tabuyuthul]] || [[word:tabuyujul|tabuyujul]] || [[word:tabuyushul|tabuyushul]] || [[word:tabuyukul|tabuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tabuyuthuthu|tabuyuthuthu]] || [[word:tabuyujuju|tabuyujuju]] || [[word:tabuyushushu|tabuyushushu]] || [[word:tabuyuku|tabuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tabuyuthun|tabuyuthun]] || [[word:tabuyujun|tabuyujun]] || [[word:tabuyushun|tabuyushun]] || [[word:tabuyukun|tabuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tabuyuthuoro|tabuyuthuoro]] || [[word:tabuyujuoro|tabuyujuoro]] || [[word:tabuyushuoro|tabuyushuoro]] || [[word:tabuyukuoro|tabuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
